featured.headline: Folder structure is the API.
featured.body: Position-addressed memory beats named imports. Names rot when you rename things; positions don't. The whole site is built on this idea — your folder paths ARE your routing, your taxonomy, your contract. ICM makes this explicit.

supporting.body: Code shows what. The why goes in CLAUDE.md, the wiki, the commit body. Future-you needs both.
Vertical slices ship. Horizontal slices die in PR review. Cut through every layer first, optimize after.
An AI tool that ships your work matters more than one that demos well. Workflow over wow.
